scenario: EN · tries to pay by card IN the chat → refused, secure link only

turns.say: Can I just give you my credit card number right now to pay for a room?
turns.transcript: Can I just give you my credit card number right now to pay for a room?
turns.reply: I can’t take card details directly — it’s not secure. But I can send you a secure booking link right now. Which room and dates would you like? I’ll put the payment link on your screen.
